about.title: About LBS Pithoragarh
about.overview: LBS Pithoragarh is a leading skill development and employability-focused training institute committed to bridging the gap between education and employment across Uttarakhand and beyond.

legacy.description: Over the years, the institute has successfully trained thousands of students in Information Technology, Data Analytics, Digital Skills, Accounting, Professional Development, and other career-oriented programs.

about.vision: To become Uttarakhand's most trusted employability and skill development institute by empowering learners with knowledge, practical skills, and career opportunities.
about.mission: To provide accessible, high-quality, industry-relevant education that enables students to become professionally successful while contributing to sustainable community development.
